error_signature: Send Email node fails without error message
title: Send Email node fails and stops workflow execution
symptom: The workflow stops executing when the Send Email node encounters an error, without providing an error message in the output.
applies_when: Workflow execution is halted due to node failure
not_this_if: Error handling is already configured to continue execution
root_cause: By default, the Send Email node stops the workflow execution upon encountering an error, which can be problematic if you want to handle errors gracefully and continue processing.
fix_steps: Open the Send Email node settings
Change the 'On Error' option to 'Continue Working'
Connect another node to the error output for handling
agent_instruction: Change the Send Email node's error handling to continue working and connect an error handling node.
